headline: GDP and Economic Growth
description: GDP (Gross Domestic Product) measures the total market value of all final goods and services produced in a country. GDP = C + I + G + (X-M): Consumption + Investment + Government spending + Net exports. Nominal GDP (current prices) vs. Real GDP (inflation-adjusted). GDP per capita approximates living standards.

citation.name: GDP: A Brief but Affectionate History (Diane Coyle)
